scope: Productionized provider-chain registry for PDD earnings-call transcripts. This replaces the older webcast/YouTube/Gemini-specific official-event collector for this agent.

audit_policy.source_of_record_rule: Use SEC filings, official annual reports, official earnings releases, and company IR filings as source of record for reported financial numbers. Use earnings-call transcripts for management commentary, Q&A, and strategy framing.
audit_policy.third_party_transcript_rule: Alpha Vantage transcript records are allowed as cached provider evidence under the configured API/source policy, but redistribution rights must be reviewed before copying text outside this system.
audit_policy.third_party_web_rule: StockAnalysis, Motley Fool, Seeking Alpha, Benzinga, Quartr, and similar third-party web pages are link-only candidates unless storage rights are confirmed.
audit_policy.local_transcript_rule: A local transcript can be ingested only with provider/source type/confidence/license metadata.
audit_policy.no_fabrication_rule: Never invent missing transcript text. If the provider is rate-limited or a quarter is missing, record the missing quarter and source candidates.

sources.name: PDD Alpha Vantage earnings-call transcript backfill
sources.license_notes: Review Alpha Vantage terms for your intended storage and redistribution use before production export.

sources.name: PDD local/user-provided earnings-call transcript intake
sources.license_notes: Fill quarter/path/source metadata before use. Do not ingest copied third-party text unless storage rights are confirmed.

candidates.license_notes: Use as discovery/source-candidate link only unless storage rights are confirmed.
Use as discovery/source-candidate link only unless storage rights are confirmed.
Likely access restrictions. Use manually only if account/license permits.
Requires separate app/API workflow and terms review.
Official IR source. Store transcript text only if an official transcript/file is available and permitted.
